evals.prompt: Bootstrap the agent with the proto-backed tools package; no tools registered yet, just wiring.
evals.expected_output: internal/tools package created, tools.proto stub with json_schema.generate, agent entrypoint wired with empty MyTools(), build passes
assertions: service.go defines empty MyTools returning empty slice

evals.prompt: Add a sync tool lookup_ticket that takes ticket_id and returns status and summary.
evals.expected_output: LookupTicket RPC in tools.proto, handler on myToolsService, registered in MyTools as lookup_ticket with FullMethodDescription

evals.prompt: Add archive_session tool returning empty; require user confirmation.
evals.expected_output: ArchiveSession RPC, NewToolForEmpty registration with WithRequireConfirmation
